element_op_code: float a = x_val; float b = y_val; ascend::std::swap(a, b); z_val = a;
notes: In-place void op. We copy x_val,y_val into locals a,b, call swap(a,b), then output a. After a correct swap, a holds y's original value, so the independent golden is simply expected = y_ref (no ascend::std). This verifies swap actually exchanged the operands rather than smuggling in a value-returning signature.
